property.caption: Title
property.description: Fallback title shown when Title Attribute is empty.

property.caption: Title Attribute
property.description: Optional context attribute for the main title.

property.caption: Title Content
property.description: Optional custom widget content for the title area. If provided, this overrides Title and Title Attribute.

property.caption: Schedule Text
property.description: Fallback schedule text shown when date attributes are not configured.

property.caption: Start Date Attribute
property.description: Optional context date attribute for the start date/time.

property.caption: End Date Attribute
property.description: Optional context date attribute for the end date/time.

property.caption: Schedule Content
property.description: Optional custom widget content for the schedule area. If provided, this overrides Schedule Text and date attributes.

property.caption: Category Text
property.description: Fallback category, room, or label text.

property.caption: Category Attribute
property.description: Optional context attribute for category, room, or label text.

property.caption: Primary Bar Content
property.description: Optional custom widget content for the first detail bar. If provided, this overrides Category Text and Category Attribute.

property.caption: Owner Text
property.description: Fallback owner or requester text.

property.caption: Owner Attribute
property.description: Optional context attribute for owner or requester text.

property.caption: Secondary Bar Content
property.description: Optional custom widget content for the second detail bar. If provided, this overrides Owner Text and Owner Attribute.

property.caption: Detail Items
property.description: Add as many detail rows as needed. Each row can use Mendix widgets for the icon and content.

property.caption: Icon Content
property.description: Drag an icon, image, text, or any Mendix widget here for the row icon.

property.caption: Fallback Text
property.description: Fallback row text when Content is empty.

property.caption: Content
property.description: Drag Text or any Mendix widget here for the row body.

property.caption: Variant
property.description: Select the visual treatment.

property.caption: Accent Color
property.description: Optional CSS color for title and accents.

property.caption: Show Actions
property.description: Show edit and delete action buttons.

property.caption: On Edit
property.description: Optional action when the edit button is clicked.

property.caption: On Delete
property.description: Optional action when the delete button is clicked.
